steps.title: Follow the contrast after although
steps.content: Although Hawaiian literature is heterogeneous, the passage says scholars connect works by modern writers to traditional Kānaka Maoli stories. The blank should name thematic linkage across time.

steps.title: Choose connection over novelty
steps.content: Choices A and B describe general qualities rather than a thematic link, and Choice C suggests newness instead of connection to tradition. The remaining choice means ongoing connection. The answer is D.
